event_error_conditions.esm.description: Expected validation errors for invalid event system configurations

schema_errors.message: Value 'invalid_trigger_type' is not one of the allowed trigger types: ['condition', 'periodic', 'preset_times']
Periodic trigger is missing required field 'interval'
Preset times array must contain at least one time value
Event must have either 'affects' or 'functional_affect', but not both

structural_errors.message: Pre() operator is not allowed in event conditions, only in affect equations
Event modifies parameter 'valid_param' but parameter is not listed in discrete_parameters
Functional affect read_vars includes undefined variable 'undefined_variable'
Functional affect modified_params includes undefined parameter 'another_undefined_param'
Cross-system event modifies parameter 'ErrorTestModel.valid_param' but missing discrete_parameters declaration

runtime_errors.message: Multiple events with simultaneous conditions may produce non-deterministic ordering
runtime_errors.context: Implementation-dependent behavior when events fire simultaneously

runtime_errors.message: Event condition evaluation near machine epsilon may be unstable
runtime_errors.context: Events with conditions very close to zero may exhibit platform-dependent behavior

runtime_errors.message: Chained discrete parameter modifications may create infinite event loops
runtime_errors.context: Events that trigger other events through parameter changes require cycle detection
